languages.text: "Видел главного ксеноса? Что можешь сказать о нем?"
"Have you seen the chief xenos? What can you tell me about him?"
languages.original_text: "Видел главного ксеноса? Что можешь сказать о нем?"

traits.locale_text: "Have you seen the chief xenos? What can you tell me about him?"
"Have you seen the chief xenos? What can you tell me about him?"
"Have you seen the chief xenos? What can you tell me about him?"

languages.text: 「異種族の首領を見たことがるか？彼について何か教えてくれ」
languages.original_text: "Have you seen the chief xenos? What can you tell me about him?"

traits.locale_text: 「異種族の首領を見たことがありますか？彼について何か教えていただけますか？」

languages.text: «¿Ha visto al jefe de los xenos? ¿Qué puede decirme sobre él?».
languages.original_text: "Have you seen the chief xenos? What can you tell me about him?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Ha visto al jefe de los xenos? ¿Qué puede decirme sobre él?».

languages.text: "Habt Ihr den Anführer der Xenos gesehen? Was könnt Ihr mir über ihn sagen?"
languages.original_text: "Have you seen the chief xenos? What can you tell me about him?"

traits.locale_text: "Habt Ihr den Anführer der Xenos gesehen? Was könnt Ihr mir über ihn sagen?"

languages.text: « Avez-vous vu le chef xénos ? Que pouvez-vous me dire à son sujet ? »
languages.original_text: "Have you seen the chief xenos? What can you tell me about him?"

traits.locale_text: « Avez-vous vu le chef xénos ? Que pouvez-vous me dire à son sujet ? »

languages.text: “你见过异形首领吗？你对他了解多少？”
languages.original_text: "Have you seen the chief xenos? What can you tell me about him?"

traits.locale_text: “你见过异形首领吗？你对他了解多少？”

languages.text: "Zenoların başını gördün mü? Hakkında bana ne söyleyebilirsin?"
languages.original_text: "Have you seen the chief xenos? What can you tell me about him?"

traits.locale_text: "Zenoların başını gördün mü? Hakkında bana ne söyleyebilirsin?"
